metadata.description: Base name for all resources (lowercase, no special chars)
Existing Log Analytics Workspace resource ID. If empty, a new workspace is created.
Deployer principal ID (for initial Key Vault access)
Storage account name (3-24 chars, lowercase, no dashes)
Principal IDs to grant Key Vault Secrets User role
Custom table name (without _CL suffix in the resource name)
Key Vault name to store DCR immutable ID
Service Bus namespace FQDN (for RBAC-based auth)
DCR Immutable ID Key Vault secret URI
Client certificate thumbprint (stored in Key Vault for reference)

properties.contentType: Client certificate thumbprint for DO-Monitor clients

metadata.description: Principal IDs to grant App Configuration Data Reader role
